title: Founding Engineer
description:
Mobasi builds autonomous AI agents for digital forensics investigations serving law enforcement. The platform orchestrates 150+ forensic analysis tools, automating evidence analysis that previously took days into minutes.

Mobasi seeks a founding engineer to own infrastructure, DevOps, and productionization as the company scales from pilot deployments to dozens of customers. This is the first non-cofounder hire.

Core Responsibilities:
- Build and automate the deployment pipeline for thousand-customer scaling
- Manage multi-cloud infrastructure (AWS, GCP, Azure, Anthropic, OpenAI APIs)
- Own security and compliance frameworks (CJIS, SOC2)
- Design CI/CD systems handling massive forensic datasets (tens-hundreds of gigabytes)
- Make architectural decisions independently without ticket-based workflows

Required Qualifications:
- Daily AI tool usage in engineering work (hard requirement)
- Cloud account provisioning and API integration experience
- CI/CD pipeline and compliance management background
- Full-stack infrastructure ownership capability
- Self-directed work style without micromanagement

Ideal Candidate Profile:
- Continuous learner with self-driven project experience
- Mission-aligned with law enforcement technology advancement
- Willingness to handle customer interactions and compliance paperwork
- Detail-oriented despite heavy AI tool reliance

Tech Stack: Rust, TypeScript, Python, PowerShell, Bash. Infrastructure: GitHub, Docker, Pulumi, Terraform. Runtimes: Node, Bun, Cargo, Turborepo.

Compensation: Starting at $240,000/year base salary with profit sharing. Generous healthcare, relocation stipend (Austin-based), top-tier equipment.

requirements.description: Daily AI tool usage in engineering work (hard requirement)
Cloud account provisioning and API integration experience across AWS, GCP, Azure
CI/CD pipeline design and management, handling massive datasets
Self-directed work style with independent architectural decision-making
Security and compliance frameworks experience (CJIS, SOC2)
Rust proficiency as primary language in tech stack
Docker, Pulumi, and Terraform for infrastructure-as-code
Experience with Node.js runtimes and build systems (Node, Bun, Turborepo)
Startup experience as early employee with broad ownership
Customer-facing communication and compliance paperwork willingness
